title: andrachne yunnanensis
intro: Andrachne yunnanensis, also known as Yunnan Andrachne or Yunnan milkwort, is a plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Andrachne yunnanensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Traditional herbal preparations of Andrachne yunnanensis include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications of its leaves and roots.
